<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Watertier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-ìng]][[de:Wasser-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre d'eau]][[hak:Ngìm-yìm]][[ja:壬寅]][[ko:임인]][[vi:Nhâm Dần]][[za:Nyaemzyinz]][[zh-min-nan:Jîm-în]][[zh-yue:壬寅]][[zh:壬寅]]

'''Yang Water Tiger also known as Yang Water Tiger''' (壬寅, みずのえとら、じんすいのとら、じんいん) is one element of the [[Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive]].

It is the 39th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by [[Yin Metal Ox]] and followed by [[Yin Water Rabbit]]. In the [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]'s [[Mizunoe (壬)]] represents yang water, while the [[Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]]'s [[Tiger (zodiac)|Tiger (寅)]] represents yang wood, forming a mutual generation (water generates wood) according to the principles of the Five Elements.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Water Tiger (壬寅)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rényín
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 jan4
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tora
***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tora
***Onyomi 1: jin'in
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im-in (임인)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Dần

==Years of Yang Water Tiger==
A [[Common Era]] year that leaves a remainder of 42 when divided by 60 is considered a Yang Water Tiger [[Year|year]].
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yang Water Tiger Year'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 42|42 AD]]
* [[AD 102|102 AD]]
* [[162|162 AD]]
* [[222|222 AD]]
* [[282|282 AD]]
* [[342|342 AD]]
* [[402|402 AD]]
* [[462|462 AD]]
* [[522|522 AD]]
* [[582|582 AD]]
* [[642|642 AD]]
* [[702|702 AD]]
* [[762|762 AD]]
* [[822|822 AD]]
* [[882|882 AD]]
* [[942|942 AD]]
|
* [[1002|1002 AD]]
* [[1062|1062 AD]]
* [[1122|1122 AD]]
* [[1182|1182 AD]]
* [[1242|1242 AD]]
* [[1302|1302 AD]]
* [[1362|1362 AD]]
* [[1422|1422 AD]]
* [[1482|1482 AD]]
* [[1542|1542 AD]]
* [[1602|1602 AD]]
* [[1662|1662 AD]]
* [[1722|1722 AD]]
* [[1782|1782 AD]]
* [[1842|1842 AD]]
* [[1902|1902 AD]]
* [[1962|1962 AD]]
|
* [[2022|2022 AD]]
* [[2082 AD]]
* [[22nd century]]
* [[23rd century]]
* [[23rd century]]
* [[2322 AD]]
* [[2382 AD]]
* [[2442 AD]]
* [[2502 AD]]
* [[2562 AD]]
* [[2622 AD]]
* [[2682 AD]]
* [[2742 AD]]
* [[2802 AD]]
* [[2862 AD]]
* [[2922 AD]]
* [[2982 AD]]
|}

==Months of Yang Water Tiger==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose last digit is 2 or 7 (when the Heavenly Stem is [[Mizunoe (壬)]] or [[Hinoto (丁)]]), the month of [[January]] is considered the Yang Water Tiger [[Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or on the seasonal month (from [[Lichun|Risshun]] to the day before [[Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]).

==Days of Yang Water Tiger==
=== Selected Day ===
The Yang Water Tiger day is the 10th day of [[Tenitsu-shin]].
== See Also ==
{{wikidata link|Q1062922}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
